title: EVM Cost Forecast
description: Industrial-grade Earned Value Management cost forecasting tool with confidence-adjusted EAC, loss driver analysis, and actionable recommendations.

inputs.label: Budget at Completion
inputs.businessContext: Total authorized budget for the work scope (PMBOK).

businessContext_i18n.en: Total authorized budget for the work scope (PMBOK).
businessContext_i18n.tr: İş kapsamı için toplam yetkilendirilmiş bütçe (PMBOK).
businessContext_i18n.de: Gesamtes genehmigtes Budget für den Arbeitsumfang (PMBOK).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Budget total autorisé pour le périmètre des travaux (PMBOK).
businessContext_i18n.es: Presupuesto total autorizado para el alcance del trabajo (PMBOK).

inputs.label: Earned Value
inputs.businessContext: Value of work actually performed, measured in budgeted cost.

businessContext_i18n.en: Value of work actually performed, measured in budgeted cost.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Gerçekleştirilen işin bütçelenmiş maliyet cinsinden değeri.
businessContext_i18n.de: Wert der tatsächlich geleisteten Arbeit, gemessen in budgetierten Kosten.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Valeur des travaux réellement effectués, mesurée en coût budgété.
businessContext_i18n.es: Valor del trabajo realmente realizado, medido en costo presupuestado.
businessContext_i18n.ar: قيمة العمل المنفذ فعليًا، مقاسة بالتكلفة المدرجة في الميزانية.

inputs.label: Actual Cost
inputs.businessContext: Total cost incurred for the work performed.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total cost incurred for the work performed.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Gerçekleştirilen iş için oluşan toplam maliyet.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Coût total encouru pour les travaux effectués.
businessContext_i18n.es: Costo total incurrido por el trabajo realizado.

inputs.label: Planned Value
inputs.businessContext: Authorized budget for the work scheduled to be completed.

businessContext_i18n.en: Authorized budget for the work scheduled to be completed.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Tamamlanması planlanan iş için yetkilendirilmiş bütçe.
businessContext_i18n.de: Genehmigtes Budget für die planmäßig abzuschließende Arbeit.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Budget autorisé pour les travaux planifiés à réaliser.
businessContext_i18n.es: Presupuesto autorizado para el trabajo programado a completar.

inputs.label: Percent Complete (physical)
inputs.businessContext: Objective physical progress estimate (e.g., via earned value rules).

businessContext_i18n.en: Objective physical progress estimate (e.g., via earned value rules).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Nesnel fiziksel ilerleme tahmini (örn. kazanılan değer kuralları ile).
businessContext_i18n.de: Objektiver physischer Fortschrittsschätzung (z. B. über Earned-Value-Regeln).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Estimation objective de l'avancement physique (par ex., via les règles de la valeur acquise).
businessContext_i18n.es: Estimación objetiva del progreso físico (ej. mediante reglas de valor ganado).
businessContext_i18n.ar: تقدير التقدم المادي الموضوعي (مثل قواعد القيمة المكتسبة).

inputs.label: Cost Performance Index (override)
inputs.businessContext: If provided, overrides calculated CPI. CPI = EV/AC.

businessContext_i18n.en: If provided, overrides calculated CPI. CPI = EV/AC.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Sağlanırsa, hesaplanan MPI'yi geçersiz kılar. MPI = KD/BM.
businessContext_i18n.de: Falls angegeben, überschreibt den berechneten CPI. CPI = EV/AC.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Si fourni, remplace l'IPC calculé. IPC = EV/AC.
businessContext_i18n.es: Si se proporciona, anula el CPI calculado. CPI = EV/AC.
businessContext_i18n.ar: إذا تم توفيره، فإنه يتجاوز مؤشر أداء التكلفة المحسوب. CPI = EV / AC.

inputs.label: Schedule Performance Index (override)
inputs.businessContext: If provided, overrides calculated SPI. SPI = EV/PV.

businessContext_i18n.en: If provided, overrides calculated SPI. SPI = EV/PV.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Sağlanırsa, hesaplanan PPE'yi geçersiz kılar. PPE = KD/PD.
businessContext_i18n.de: Falls angegeben, überschreibt den berechneten SPI. SPI = EV/PV.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Si fourni, remplace l'ISP calculé. ISP = EV/PV.
businessContext_i18n.es: Si se proporciona, anula el SPI calculado. SPI = EV/PV.
businessContext_i18n.ar: إذا تم توفيره، فإنه يتجاوز مؤشر أداء الجدول الزمني المحسوب. SPI = EV / PV.

inputs.label: Use weighted CPI/SPI for EAC
inputs.businessContext: If true, applies 0.8*CPI + 0.2*SPI weighting for EAC (industry practice).

label_i18n.ar: استخدام مؤشر أداء التكلفة/الجدول الزمني الموزون لتقدير التكلفة عند الإنجاز

businessContext_i18n.en: If true, applies 0.8*CPI + 0.2*SPI weighting for EAC (industry practice).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Doğruysa, TBM için 0.8*MPI + 0.2*PPE ağırlıklandırması uygular (endüstri uygulaması).
businessContext_i18n.de: Wenn wahr, wendet 0,8*CPI + 0,2*SPI-Gewichtung für EAC an (Branchenpraxis).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Si vrai, applique une pondération 0,8*IPC + 0,2*ISP pour l'EAC (pratique industrielle).
businessContext_i18n.es: Si es verdadero, aplica ponderación 0.8*CPI + 0.2*SPI para EAC (práctica industrial).
businessContext_i18n.ar: إذا كان صحيحًا، يطبق ترجيح 0.8*CPI + 0.2*SPI لتقدير التكلفة عند الإنجاز (ممارسة صناعية).

rules.message: Earned Value exceeds Actual Cost – verify data integrity.
Planned Value exceeds Budget at Completion – schedule baseline error.
Physical percent complete inconsistent with Earned Value – review measurement method.
CPI critically low (<0.5) – immediate cost control intervention required.
SPI critically low (<0.5) – schedule recovery plan needed.

thresholds.label: EAC / BAC ratio
thresholds.alert: EAC exceeds BAC by more than 20% – formal variance analysis required.

thresholds.label: TCPI (EAC) > 1.1
thresholds.alert: To-Complete Performance Index above 1.1 – aggressive performance needed to meet budget.

thresholds.label: Contingency draw > 80% of reserve
thresholds.alert: Contingency nearly exhausted – request management reserve release.

formulas.result: bac * ev * ac * pv * ((percentComplete / 100) * cpi * spi)

hiddenLossDrivers: Model uses normalized input chain — validate units
